scope: NRSV source witnesses for active Greek Daniel additions only: Prayer of Azariah/Song of the Three Jews, Susanna, and Bel and the Dragon.

approvedSourceRequirement.rule: Do not extract or commit copyrighted NRSV addition text from web candidates through automation unless an approved source-policy/license path is present in the repo or provided by the project owner.
allowedNextInputs: an approved local source file committed to the repo
a project-owned/licensed source witness with documented provenance
a governance decision that the existing active addition text is to be compared against a specific external source manually without committing the source text

allowedActions: map DRB, NABRE, and KJV source forms for Greek Daniel additions because local/historical source witnesses are already bound
record source-acquisition status without copying NRSV addition text
prepare comparison scripts that require a locally approved NRSV addition source file before running
nextRequiredWork: Map bound KJV Daniel addition source files to active Greek Daniel addition placements.
Map bound DRB Daniel source form to active Greek Daniel addition placements.
Map bound NABRE Daniel source form to active Greek Daniel addition placements.
Acquire or approve an NRSV addition source witness before active addition text collation.
resolution: NRSV-CI.SQLite3 (the same bound, approved NRSV source witness already used across this entire remediation effort) contains all three addition units as separate books: 'Prayer of Azariah and the Song of the Three Jews' (book_number 323, 68 verses), 'Susanna' (book_number 325, 64 verses), and 'Bel and the Dragon' (book_number 345, 42 verses). This was not known when this gate was recorded 2026-06-28. All three units audited and fixed against this source. The 'candidate_identified_not_bound' Oremus entries below are now moot -- NRSV-CI was the actual solution, not Oremus.
